goal_achieved.description: Indicates whether the iteration achieved the stated GOAL.

summary.description: A high-level summary of the iteration's execution and test results.

error.description: Details of a critical infrastructure, deployment, or compilation error that blocked execution.

summary.description: Brief, planner-ready title of the error.

logs.description: Relevant log excerpt including surrounding lines and stack trace.

test_errors.description: List of test failures or errors encountered during automated testing.

summary.description: Short, planner-ready title of the test failure or error.

logs.description: Full relevant log excerpt for the test failure or error.
